headline: Is Rapport Therapeutics (RAPP) Using RAP-219 To Redefine Its Broader Neuroscience Investment Narrative?
summary: In late May 2026, analysts BTIG and Truist highlighted Rapport Therapeutics’ RAP-219 program after the company reported progress toward Phase 3 trials, supported by earlier Phase 2a follow-up data. An interesting angle is how RAP-219’s dual focus on epilepsy and bipolar mania, including a planned long-acting injectable, could broaden Rapport’s clinical opportunity set. We’ll now examine how this momentum in RAP-219, particularly its Phase 3 preparation, influences Rapport Therapeutics’...
